programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Ricordando Diana, Principessa di Galles include scene del suo funerale di Stato e parole sentite dai suoi amici più cari. È uno sguardo caldo e riflessivo su Diana sia come persona che come figura pubblica: la regina che non è mai stata e la principessa che sarà sempre ricordata.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Nonostante tutto il clamore mediatico, gran parte del quale non è affatto lusinghiero, Harry rimane un po' un enigma. Questo coinvolgente documentario offre nuove intuizioni e riprese per fare luce su un principe reale che ha affrontato sia il dolore che gli scandali.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E05 - Bull Run
programme.desc: Quando sorge il sole, dà vita alla valle e gli animali iniziano a muoversi.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E06 - Stay Or Go
programme.desc: C'è ancora molta strada da fare nel viaggio, ma i fratelli dovrebbero lasciare andare gli animali per cercarne altri?

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E18 - Head Case
programme.desc: Qualcuno spara illegalmente a un alce maschio trofeo e nasconde la testa. Gli agenti della fauna selvatica trascorrono mesi a sorvegliare l'area. Quando la testa viene finalmente spostata, usano tecnologie avanzate per rintracciare e catturare la persona responsabile.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E19 - Blood Trail
programme.desc: I guardiani entrano nel mondo della CSI, determinando dove è stato ucciso un cervo; per scoprire la verità, la cosa migliore è seguire la traccia di sangue.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E06 - Into The Deep
programme.desc: I piloti del bush devono usare tutte le loro abilità - immersioni subacquee, sartiame sottomarino e voli esperti - per cercare di recuperare un'ala di un de Havilland Beaver sul fondo del 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E07 - Flying High
programme.desc: I piloti di bush Tanalian trasportano parapendisti estremi a Moose Creek, nella Talkeetna Range, per un'esperienza di volo unica nella vita.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E05 - Burnt River
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are sluicing in Eastern Oregon, looking for gold.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E06 - Golden Flight
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his son Kael, are dredging in Anchorage, trying to find some gold for Cindy's birthday gift.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Ricordando Diana, Principessa di Galles include scene del suo funerale di Stato e parole sentite dai suoi amici più cari. È uno sguardo caldo e riflessivo su Diana sia come persona che come figura pubblica: la regina che non è mai stata e la principessa che sarà sempre ricordata.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Nonostante tutto il clamore mediatico, gran parte del quale non è affatto lusinghiero, Harry rimane un po' un enigma. Questo coinvolgente documentario offre nuove intuizioni e riprese per fare luce su un principe reale che ha affrontato sia il dolore che gli scandali.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E05 - Bull Run
programme.desc: Quando sorge il sole, dà vita alla valle e gli animali iniziano a muoversi.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E05 - From Inquisitive Bears to Caribou
programme.desc: Un oso curioso interfiere en los planes de construcción de Charlie Summerville; Pat Harvie le muestra a su esposa Connie cómo pescar salmón como lo hacen en las Aleutianas, y Merrick Jackinsky busca caribú.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville desaparece mientras intenta transportar materiales de construcción en barco. Mientras tanto, Pat y Connie Harvie deben manejar una avalancha de expertos en volcanes que llegan a la ranch más aislada de América.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: En 'Badge Bust', la sobreconfianza de una insignia causa problemas a otra insignia. Mientras tanto, 'Beluga Whale' cuenta la historia de una criatura marina lejos de casa que vive una gran aventura.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Esta es una descripción de ejemplo.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E06 - Lobster Poaching and Black Walnut
programme.desc: En 'Caza furtiva de langostas,' un cazador furtivo tiene un mal día al saltar al barco equivocado. Mientras tanto, 'Nogal negro' narra una historia sobre una especie sorprendente que capta la atención de un guardabosques. Los guardabosques recuerdan casos y experiencias inolvidables de sus trabajos.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan viaja a Mozambique para unirse a un equipo anti-caza furtiva que se centra en capturar cazadores furtivos y proteger a los animales en peligro.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E05 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservacionistas capturan y estudian ciervos de cola blanca en el gélido invierno de Dakota del Sur.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E06 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Los conservacionistas utilizan tácticas sofisticadas para capturar kudu, impala y jirafas.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E05 - Wardens Instinct
programme.desc: A menudo hay una delgada línea entre la información falsa y la verdad. Los guardianes veteranos de la Región 5 utilizan su sexto sentido para llevar a los violadores de la ley de caza ante la justicia.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E06 - Fourth Dimension
programme.desc: El cuatro de julio en Flathead Lake, Montana, es donde está la fiesta. Pero con el calor, los ánimos se caldean y el flujo libre de alcohol contribuye a crear una situación peligrosa.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E07 - Behind The Shed
programme.desc: Cuando se abren las áreas de caza para la caza de cuernos de ciervo, todos están listos para los Guardianes de Juego de Montana. Los informes de osos, pumas y cazadores perdidos mantienen ocupados a los guardianes.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: En Volcano Bay, los nervios comienzan a desgastarse para Charlie Summerville y su equipo mientras se embarcan en la construcción de la cabaña en la naturaleza.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E05 - From Inquisitive Bears to Caribou
programme.desc: Un oso curioso interfiere en los planes de construcción de Charlie Summerville; Pat Harvie le muestra a su esposa Connie cómo pescar salmón como lo hacen en las Aleutianas, y Merrick Jackinsky busca caribú.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville desaparece mientras intenta transportar materiales de construcción en barco. Mientras tanto, Pat y Connie Harvie deben manejar una avalancha de expertos en volcanes que llegan a la ranch más aislada de América.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: En 'Badge Bust', la sobreconfianza de una insignia causa problemas a otra insignia. Mientras tanto, 'Beluga Whale' cuenta la historia de una criatura marina lejos de casa que vive una gran aventura.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Esta es una descripción de ejemplo.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E06 - Lobster Poaching and Black Walnut
programme.desc: En 'Caza furtiva de langostas,' un cazador furtivo tiene un mal día al saltar al barco equivocado. Mientras tanto, 'Nogal negro' narra una historia sobre una especie sorprendente que capta la atención de un guardabosques. Los guardabosques recuerdan casos y experiencias inolvidables de sus trabajos.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan viaja a Mozambique para unirse a un equipo anti-caza furtiva que se centra en capturar cazadores furtivos y proteger a los animales en peligro.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E05 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservacionistas capturan y estudian ciervos de cola blanca en el gélido invierno de Dakota del Sur.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E06 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Los conservacionistas utilizan tácticas sofisticadas para capturar kudu, impala y jirafas.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E05 - Wardens Instinct

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Esta es una descripción de ejemplo.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush
programme.desc: Después de más de tres semanas de trekking por el país de los alces, los hermanos Chris y Casey Keefer finalmente montan campamento en un nuevo lugar y casi de inmediato se encuentran cara a cara con un enorme macho.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E10 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: Con las probabilidades en su contra, la aventura de 80 millas por el río casi ha terminado, y los hermanos Chris y Casey Keefer tienen una última oportunidad para encontrar un alce de Alaska a solo unas millas de donde serán recogidos en la intersección del río.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E01 - To Be Alive
programme.desc: Chris y Casey Keefer revisan las entradas de video para elegir una pareja afortunada que los acompañe a Alaska. Los cazadores se conocen por primera vez en el aeropuerto. Casey y Kaid son dejados, mientras que Chris y los demás enfrentan retrasos en el hangar.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E02 - Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: El clima en Alaska mejora lo suficiente para que Chris y Kaid lleguen a su destino y atrapen algo de comida. Mientras tanto, Casey y R.L. ya han montado su campamento, preparándose para la temporada de alces. Los hermanos deberán acostumbrarse a la idea de ser dejados por separado por primera vez.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E03 - Predators Prowl
programme.desc: Chris y Kaid estaban preparando sus balsas, mientras Casey y R.L. comenzaron a buscar osos negros y alces. Justo en ese momento, Chris y Kaid notaron un depredador acercándose a su campamento.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E02 - Earthquake
programme.desc: Cuando la Tierra se mueve de verdad, significa un desastre a escala épica. Horas desesperadas analiza la fuerza destructiva de los terremotos y se fija en el terremoto de Katmandú (Nepal) de 2015, el terremoto de Sichuan (China) de 2008, en el que se calcula que 10.000 niños quedaron atrapados en edificios escolares derrumbados, el terremoto de Puerto Mont (Chile) de 1960, el terremoto de Puerto Príncipe (Haití) de 2010 y el terremoto de Cachemira (Pakistán) de 2005.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E03 - Epidemic
programme.desc: Desperate Hours analiza grandes epidemias como el brote africano de ébola en Sudán, que acabó provocando casos en Estados Unidos e Inglaterra, el brote indio de viruela en Bihar, el brote africano de cólera, el brote de SARS en Guanghzhou (China) y la gripe aviar de Hong Kong.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E04 - Wind
programme.desc: Horas desesperadas analiza el poder destructivo del viento. Desde el poder devastador del huracán Katrina en Nueva Orleans hasta el destructor ciclón Nargis en Myanmar, pasando por la tormenta de 1960, el huracán Donna en Florida, el tornado Joplin en Misuri y el huracán Sandy en Nueva York.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E05 - Fire
programme.desc: El terror abrasador de un incendio puede equipararse a cualquier cosa de la creación en lo que a amenaza se refiere. Desperate Hours analiza la fuerza destructiva de los incendios, como el del sábado negro en Victoria (Australia), el de la discoteca Station en Rhode Island, el de los grandes almacenes L'Innovation en Bruselas (Bélgica), el de la armería en Lagos (Nigeria) y el de la nueva zona de desarrollo de Binhai en Tianjin (China).

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E06 - Flood
programme.desc: Cuando se rompe el dique, la cosa se pone fea.... Horas desesperadas repasa algunas de las inundaciones más devastadoras de la historia, como la de Río de Janeiro en Brasil, las de Luisiana en Estados Unidos, las de Hamburgo en Alemania, las de Uttarakhand en el norte de la India y el tsunami del Océano Índico en el sudeste asiático.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E01 - Into the High Lonesome
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller emprende El Camino con su fiel caballo 7, para poner a prueba sus habilidades de supervivencia y rendir homenaje a los hombres de montaña del pasado. Al despedirse de su familia, Laramy y 7 tienen que luchar contra los elementos, construir refugios, vivir de la tierra y sobrevivir a una travesía de 30 días por el interior del país.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E02 - Camp Otis
programme.desc: El moderno montañero Laramy Miller emprende el camino para experimentar la vida en la alta soledad.

programme.title: The Trail- S01:E03 - Relocation
programme.desc: Laramy se da cuenta de que la caza escasea debido a los lobos y decide poner distancia entre él y la manada. Es hora de levantar el campamento y trasladarse a un nuevo lugar.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E04 - White Death
programme.desc: يوقف الثلج، الذي يطلق عليه رجال الجبال الموت الأبيض، لارامي في طريقه. بالإضافة إلى ذلك، تعرض حصانه المخلص 7 لإصابة في ساقه. يجب على لارامي أن يعتني بسبعة ويكافح الجوع وينجو من تساقط الثلوج.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Recordando a Diana, Princesa de Gales incluye escenas de su funeral de estado y palabras sentidas de sus amigos más cercanos. Es una mirada cálida y reflexiva a Diana tanto como persona como figura pública: la reina que nunca fue y la princesa que siempre será recordada.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: A pesar de todo el revuelo mediático, gran parte del cual no es precisamente halagador, Harry sigue siendo un poco enigmático. Este cautivador documental ofrece nuevos conocimientos y metrajes para arrojar luz sobre un príncipe real que ha lidiado con desamor y escándalos.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E05 - Bull Run
programme.desc: A medida que sale el sol, da vida al valle, y los animales comienzan a moverse.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E06 - Stay Or Go
programme.desc: Todavía queda un largo camino en el viaje, pero ¿deberían los hermanos dejar ir a los animales para buscar otros animales?

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E18 - Head Case
programme.desc: Alguien dispara ilegalmente a un alce trofeo y esconde su cabeza. Los agentes de vida silvestre pasan meses observando el área. Cuando la cabeza finalmente se mueve, utilizan tecnología avanzada para rastrearla y atrapar a la persona responsable.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E19 - Blood Trail
programme.desc: Los guardianes entran en el mundo de CSI, determinando dónde fue asesinado un ciervo; al descubrir la verdad, lo mejor es seguir la pista de sangre.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E06 - Into The Deep
programme.desc: Los pilotos de bush tienen que utilizar todas sus habilidades -buceo, aparejo submarino y vuelo experto- para intentar salvar un ala de de Havilland Beaver en el fondo del lago 6 Mile.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E07 - Flying High
programme.desc: Los pilotos de bush de Tanalian transportan parapentes extremos a Moose Creek, en la cordillera de Talkeetna, para vivir una experiencia aérea única en la vida.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E05 - Burnt River
programme.desc: Esta semana en Fiebre del Oro Tom y su hija Kia buscan oro en el este de Oregon.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E06 - Golden Flight
programme.desc: Esta semana en Fiebre del Oro, Tom y su hijo Kael, dragan en Anchorage, intentando encontrar oro para el regalo de cumpleaños de Cindy.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Recordando a Diana, Princesa de Gales incluye escenas de su funeral de estado y palabras sentidas de sus amigos más cercanos. Es una mirada cálida y reflexiva a Diana tanto como persona como figura pública: la reina que nunca fue y la princesa que siempre será recordada.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: A pesar de todo el revuelo mediático, gran parte del cual no es precisamente halagador, Harry sigue siendo un poco enigmático. Este cautivador documental ofrece nuevos conocimientos y metrajes para arrojar luz sobre un príncipe real que ha lidiado con desamor y escándalos.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E05 - Bull Run
programme.desc: A medida que sale el sol, da vida al valle, y los animales comienzan a moverse.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E05 - From Inquisitive Bears to Caribou
programme.desc: A curious bear messes with Charlie Summerville's building plans; Pat Harvie shows his wife Connie how to fish for salmon like they do in the Aleutians, and Merrick Jackinsky goes looking for caribou.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville disappears while trying to transport building supplies by boat. Meanwhile, Pat and Connie Harvie have to handle a flood of volcano experts showing up at the most isolated ranch in America.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: In 'Badge Bust,' one badge's over confidence gets another badge in trouble. Meanwhile, 'Beluga Whale' tells the story of a sea creature far from home that's quite the adventure.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Game Wardens take on one of the biggest cases ever in Ohio's Division of Wildlife's 146-year history. They must figure out what happened when a bunch of people break the law. In "Seat Belt," a routine traffic stop leads to a surprising find.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E06 - Lobster Poaching and Black Walnut
programme.desc: In "Lobster Poaching," a poacher has a bad day by jumping into the wrong boat. Meanwhile, "Black Walnut" tells a story about a surprising species that catches a Game Warden's attention. Game Wardens reminisce about unforgettable cases and experiences from their jobs.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E05 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and study Whitetail Deer in the frigid South Dakotan winter.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E06 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E05 - Wardens Instinct
programme.desc: There is often a fine line between false information and the truth. Veteran Region 5 wardens use their sixth sense to bring game violators to justice.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E06 - Fourth Dimension
programme.desc: Fourth of July in Montana's Flathead Lake is where the party is at. But with the heat tempers flare and the free flowing alcohol combines to make a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E07 - Behind The Shed
programme.desc: When the game ranges are opened up for Antler Shed Hunting, it's all hands on deck for the Montana Game Wardens. Reports of bears, mountain lions and lost hunters keep the wardens busy.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, nerves begin to fray for Charlie Summerville and his team as they embark on constructing the wilderness cabin.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: In 'Badge Bust,' one badge's over confidence gets another badge in trouble. Meanwhile, 'Beluga Whale' tells the story of a sea creature far from home that's quite the adventure.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Game Wardens take on one of the biggest cases ever in Ohio's Division of Wildlife's 146-year history. They must figure out what happened when a bunch of people break the law. In "Seat Belt," a routine traffic stop leads to a surprising find.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush
programme.desc: After more than three weeks trekking through moose country, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer finally set up camp in a new spot and almost immediately come face-to-face with a massive bull.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E10 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: With the odds piling against them, the 80-mile river adventure is almost over, and brothers Chris and Casey Keefer have one final opportunity to find an Alaskan moose just a few miles from where they'll be picked up at the river junction.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E01 - To Be Alive
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer check out video entries to pick a lucky pair to come with them to Alaska. The hunters meet each other at the airport for the first time. Casey and Kaid get Dropped off, while Chris and the rest face delays at the hangar.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E02 - Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: The weather in Alaska eases up just enough for Chris and Kaid to make it to their destination and catch some food. Meanwhile, Casey and R.L. have already set up camp, gearing up for moose season. The brothers need to get used to the idea of being dropped off separately for the first time.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E03 - Predators Prowl
programme.desc: Chris and Kaid were getting their rafts set up, while Casey and R.L. started looking around for black bears and moose. Just then, Chris and Kaid noticed a predator making its way towards their campsite.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E02 - Earthquake
programme.desc: When the Earth really moves, it means disaster on an epic scale. Desperate Hours looks at the destructive force of earthquakes and looks at the 2015 Kathmandu earthquake in Nepal, the 2008 Sichuan earthquake in China where an estimated 10,000 children were trapped in collapsed school buildings, a 1960 Puerto Mont earthquake in Chile, the 2010 Port-au-Princ earthquake in Haiti, and the 2005 Kashmir earthquake in Pakistan.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E03 - Epidemic
programme.desc: Desperate Hours looks at major epidemics including the African Ebola outbreak in Sudan which eventually led to cases in the United State and England, the Indian Smallpox outbreak in Bihar, the African Cholera outbreak, the SARS outbreak in Guanghzhou China, and the Bird Flu of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E04 - Wind
programme.desc: Desperate Hours looks at the destructive power of wind. From the devastating power of Hurricane Katrina in New Orleans to the destructive Cyclone Nargis in Myanmar, the 1960 storm Hurricane Donna in Florida, Tornado Joplin in Missouri, and Hurricane Sandy in New York.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E05 - Fire
programme.desc: The blazing terror of a fire can match anything in creation for sheer menace. Desperate Hours looks at the destructive force of fires including the Black Saturday Bushfires in Victoria Australia, the Station Nightclub fire in Rhode Island, the L'Innovation Department Store fire in Brussels Belgium, the Armoury fire in Lagos Nigeria, and the Binhai New Development Zone Fire in Tianjin China.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E06 - Flood
programme.desc: When the levee breaks, the stuff really hits the fan…. Desperate Hours looks at some of the most devastating floods in history including the flood of Rio De Janeiro in Brazil, the Louisiana floods in the United States, the Hamburg floods in Germany, the Uttarakhand floods in North India, and the Indian Ocean tsunami in Southeast Asia.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E01 - Into the High Lonesome
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller sets off on The Trail with his trusty horse 7, to test his survival skills and pay homage to mountain men of the past. Saying goodbye to his family, Laramy and 7 have to battle the elements, build shelter, live off of the land, and survive a 30-day trek through the backcountry.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E02 - Camp Otis
programme.desc: Modern-day mountain man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: The Trail- S01:E03 - Relocation
programme.desc: Laramy realizes that game is scarce because of the wolves and he decides to put some distance between himself and the pack. Time to break down camp and move to a new location.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E04 - White Death
programme.desc: Snow, what the mountain men called white death, stops Laramy in his tracks. In addition, his trusty horse 7 has suffered a leg injury. Laramy must take care of Seven, battle through hunger, and survive the snowfall.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E05 - Bull Run
programme.desc: As the sun comes up, it breathes life into the valley, and the animals start to stir and move around.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E06 - Stay Or Go
programme.desc: There's still a long way to go on the journey, but should the brothers let animals go to look for other animals?

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E18 - Head Case
programme.desc: Someone illegally shoots a trophy bull elk and hides its head. Wildlife officers spend months watching the area. When the head is finally moved, they use advanced technology to track it down and catch the person responsible.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E19 - Blood Trail
programme.desc: Wardens step into the world of CSI, in determining where a deer was killed; when uncovering the truth, the best thing is to follow the blood trail.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E06 - Into The Deep
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E07 - Flying High
programme.desc: The Tanalian bush pilots transport extreme paragliders to Moose Creek, in the Talkeetna Range, for a once-in-a-lifetime airborne experience.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E05 - Burnt River
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are sluicing in Eastern Oregon, looking for gold.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E06 - Golden Flight
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his son Kael, are dredging in Anchorage, trying to find some gold for Cindy's birthday gift.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E05 - Bull Run
programme.desc: As the sun comes up, it breathes life into the valley, and the animals start to stir and move around.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E05 - From Inquisitive Bears to Caribou
programme.desc: A curious bear messes with Charlie Summerville's building plans; Pat Harvie shows his wife Connie how to fish for salmon like they do in the Aleutians, and Merrick Jackinsky goes looking for caribou.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville disappears while trying to transport building supplies by boat. Meanwhile, Pat and Connie Harvie have to handle a flood of volcano experts showing up at the most isolated ranch in America.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: In 'Badge Bust,' one badge's over confidence gets another badge in trouble. Meanwhile, 'Beluga Whale' tells the story of a sea creature far from home that's quite the adventure.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Game Wardens take on one of the biggest cases ever in Ohio's Division of Wildlife's 146-year history. They must figure out what happened when a bunch of people break the law. In "Seat Belt," a routine traffic stop leads to a surprising find.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E06 - Lobster Poaching and Black Walnut
programme.desc: In "Lobster Poaching," a poacher has a bad day by jumping into the wrong boat. Meanwhile, "Black Walnut" tells a story about a surprising species that catches a Game Warden's attention. Game Wardens reminisce about unforgettable cases and experiences from their jobs.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E05 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and study Whitetail Deer in the frigid South Dakotan winter.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E06 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E05 - Wardens Instinct
programme.desc: There is often a fine line between false information and the truth. Veteran Region 5 wardens use their sixth sense to bring game violators to justice.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E06 - Fourth Dimension
programme.desc: Fourth of July in Montana's Flathead Lake is where the party is at. But with the heat tempers flare and the free flowing alcohol combines to make a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E07 - Behind The Shed
programme.desc: When the game ranges are opened up for Antler Shed Hunting, it's all hands on deck for the Montana Game Wardens. Reports of bears, mountain lions and lost hunters keep the wardens busy.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, nerves begin to fray for Charlie Summerville and his team as they embark on constructing the wilderness cabin.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: In 'Badge Bust,' one badge's over confidence gets another badge in trouble. Meanwhile, 'Beluga Whale' tells the story of a sea creature far from home that's quite the adventure.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Game Wardens take on one of the biggest cases ever in Ohio's Division of Wildlife's 146-year history. They must figure out what happened when a bunch of people break the law. In "Seat Belt," a routine traffic stop leads to a surprising find.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush
programme.desc: After more than three weeks trekking through moose country, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer finally set up camp in a new spot and almost immediately come face-to-face with a massive bull.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E10 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: With the odds piling against them, the 80-mile river adventure is almost over, and brothers Chris and Casey Keefer have one final opportunity to find an Alaskan moose just a few miles from where they'll be picked up at the river junction.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E01 - To Be Alive
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer check out video entries to pick a lucky pair to come with them to Alaska. The hunters meet each other at the airport for the first time. Casey and Kaid get Dropped off, while Chris and the rest face delays at the hangar.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E02 - Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: The weather in Alaska eases up just enough for Chris and Kaid to make it to their destination and catch some food. Meanwhile, Casey and R.L. have already set up camp, gearing up for moose season. The brothers need to get used to the idea of being dropped off separately for the first time.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E03 - Predators Prowl
programme.desc: Chris and Kaid were getting their rafts set up, while Casey and R.L. started looking around for black bears and moose. Just then, Chris and Kaid noticed a predator making its way towards their campsite.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E02 - Earthquake
programme.desc: When the Earth really moves, it means disaster on an epic scale. Desperate Hours looks at the destructive force of earthquakes and looks at the 2015 Kathmandu earthquake in Nepal, the 2008 Sichuan earthquake in China where an estimated 10,000 children were trapped in collapsed school buildings, a 1960 Puerto Mont earthquake in Chile, the 2010 Port-au-Princ earthquake in Haiti, and the 2005 Kashmir earthquake in Pakistan.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E03 - Epidemic
programme.desc: Desperate Hours looks at major epidemics including the African Ebola outbreak in Sudan which eventually led to cases in the United State and England, the Indian Smallpox outbreak in Bihar, the African Cholera outbreak, the SARS outbreak in Guanghzhou China, and the Bird Flu of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E04 - Wind
programme.desc: Desperate Hours looks at the destructive power of wind. From the devastating power of Hurricane Katrina in New Orleans to the destructive Cyclone Nargis in Myanmar, the 1960 storm Hurricane Donna in Florida, Tornado Joplin in Missouri, and Hurricane Sandy in New York.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E05 - Fire
programme.desc: The blazing terror of a fire can match anything in creation for sheer menace. Desperate Hours looks at the destructive force of fires including the Black Saturday Bushfires in Victoria Australia, the Station Nightclub fire in Rhode Island, the L'Innovation Department Store fire in Brussels Belgium, the Armoury fire in Lagos Nigeria, and the Binhai New Development Zone Fire in Tianjin China.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E06 - Flood
programme.desc: When the levee breaks, the stuff really hits the fan…. Desperate Hours looks at some of the most devastating floods in history including the flood of Rio De Janeiro in Brazil, the Louisiana floods in the United States, the Hamburg floods in Germany, the Uttarakhand floods in North India, and the Indian Ocean tsunami in Southeast Asia.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E01 - Into the High Lonesome
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller sets off on The Trail with his trusty horse 7, to test his survival skills and pay homage to mountain men of the past. Saying goodbye to his family, Laramy and 7 have to battle the elements, build shelter, live off of the land, and survive a 30-day trek through the backcountry.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E02 - Camp Otis
programme.desc: Modern-day mountain man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: The Trail- S01:E03 - Relocation
programme.desc: Laramy realizes that game is scarce because of the wolves and he decides to put some distance between himself and the pack. Time to break down camp and move to a new location.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E04 - White Death
programme.desc: Snow, what the mountain men called white death, stops Laramy in his tracks. In addition, his trusty horse 7 has suffered a leg injury. Laramy must take care of Seven, battle through hunger, and survive the snowfall.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush

programme.desc: As the sun comes up, it breathes life into the valley, and the animals start to stir and move around.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E06 - Stay Or Go
programme.desc: There's still a long way to go on the journey, but should the brothers let animals go to look for other animals?

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E18 - Head Case
programme.desc: Someone illegally shoots a trophy bull elk and hides its head. Wildlife officers spend months watching the area. When the head is finally moved, they use advanced technology to track it down and catch the person responsible.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E19 - Blood Trail
programme.desc: Wardens step into the world of CSI, in determining where a deer was killed; when uncovering the truth, the best thing is to follow the blood trail.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E06 - Into The Deep
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E07 - Flying High
programme.desc: The Tanalian bush pilots transport extreme paragliders to Moose Creek, in the Talkeetna Range, for a once-in-a-lifetime airborne experience.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E05 - Burnt River
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are sluicing in Eastern Oregon, looking for gold.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E06 - Golden Flight
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his son Kael, are dredging in Anchorage, trying to find some gold for Cindy's birthday gift.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: L'envers du décor
programme.sub-title: Tahiti : la face cachée du paradis
programme.desc: Tahiti, Bora-Bora, Moorea : les dessous d’un des plus beaux archipels du monde.

programme.title: Sécurité
programme.sub-title: Risky business : Le peloton de gendarmerie de haute montagne
programme.desc: Dans les Alpes, les sauveteurs du PGHM (Peloton de gendarmerie de haute montagne) prennent des risques considérables pour sauver des victimes imprudentes. Découvrez leur quotidien et les défis qu'ils relèvent dans ce documentaire captivant.
